# Layers Documentation

> Architecture and technical documentation for Layers AI OS — the operating system for knowledge teams.

## Docs

- [Roadmap](/docs/roadmap): Implementation status, priorities, and what's next
- [Execution Plan](/docs/execution-plan): Sessions 1-2 epic tracking (13 epics, all complete)

### Chat

- [Context Engineering](/docs/chat/context-engineering): System prompt caching, compaction, priority docs flow
- [Cost Observability](/docs/chat/cost-observability): Cost and token observability dashboard
- [Local Models](/docs/chat/local-models): Local model testing with Ollama
- [Media Types](/docs/chat/media-types): File support matrix per AI model

### Artifacts

- [Artifact System v2](/docs/artifacts/artifact-system-v2): Artifact types, tool registry, missing tools
- [Universal Artifact System](/docs/artifacts/universal-artifact-system): Code, documents, sandboxes — creation, versioning, editing

### Library

- [Content Organization](/docs/library/content-organization): Collections, tags, smart filters, AI classification
- [Ingestion Pipeline](/docs/library/ingestion-pipeline): Queue-based ingestion redesign
- [Library Hub & Sharing](/docs/library/library-hub-and-sharing): Product vision — library as the central hub

### Sharing

- [Document Portal](/docs/sharing/document-portal): Interactive document portal and proposal viewer
- [Sharing Permissions](/docs/sharing/sharing-permissions): Per-resource permissions model

### Organization

- [Org Permissions System](/docs/organization/org-permissions-system): Multi-org support, roles, guests, and permissions

### Integrations

- [Connector Persistence](/docs/integrations/connector-persistence): MCP ConnectionManager, OAuth auto-refresh, token persistence

### Notifications

- [Notification Events](/docs/notifications/notification-events): Notification event types and delivery
- [Scheduling](/docs/notifications/scheduling): Scheduling system for recurring tasks

### Platform

- [Auto-Registry Strategy](/docs/platform/auto-registry-strategy): Convention-over-configuration auto-generation plan
- [Brand Guide](/docs/platform/brand-guide): Colors, fonts, NeuralDots animation, component patterns
- [Mobile App](/docs/platform/mobile-app): Capacitor setup for native iOS/Android
- [Tool Result Cards](/docs/platform/tool-result-cards): Universal card component for tool outputs

### Registries

- [API Reference](/docs/registries/api-reference): API routes documentation
- [DB Schema Reference](/docs/registries/db-schema-reference): Database tables, columns, relationships
- [Tool Registry](/docs/registries/tool-registry): Built-in tool catalog and MCP integrations

## Optional

- [llms.txt spec](https://llmstxt.org): The specification this file follows
